creator: teodorsigaev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 222352
patch for graphics/drm-fbsd13-kmod

Panic caused at Xorg start, I did the patch which prevents panic but Xorg still crashed somewhere in graphics/mesa-dri. I'm not sure about correctness of my patch and its incorrectness could be a reason of mesa crash. If somebody needs more information just ask me.



% uname -a
FreeBSD xxx 13.0-BETA1 FreeBSD 13.0-BETA1 #0 releng/13.0-n244493-0b54d2764737: Thu Feb 11 02:04:40 MSK 2021     teodor@xor.sai.msu.ru:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/XOR  amd64

# pkg info | grep drm
drm-fbsd13-kmod-5.4.92.g20210202 DRM modules for the linuxkpi-based KMS components
